violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by rat burrows around property. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of trash and debris around refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the back storage area AND rat burrows behind dumpster area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
Open case retail cooler located near the soda station area was not in good repair (not on). New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026
The counter behind the slurpy machines have an accumulation of slurpy residue. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026
Inspector observed an accumulation of trash and debris around refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026

The floors in the walk-in cooler AND under drink counters have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and or trash. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026
The coving in the 3 bay sink area is in poor repair (peeling and missing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
The hand-washing sinks in the restrooms and back kitchen area were lacking paper towels. PIC replaced paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

Raw animal foods (such as raw eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as butter and hand pies) in the open case refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated eggs. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. PIC added water. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by small droppings (inside) and rat burrows (outside refuse area). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
The following was found in poor repair: - slushy machine (leak under unit into cabinet below) - large 3 shelf hot hold unit (bottom shelf ambient of 120F) New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - retail cooler shelves, - retail shelves, - cabinet under slushy machine New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of trash and debris around refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC closed lids. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
The ceiling tile in the retail area is in poor repair (previous water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The floors in the walk-in unit have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
Refuse area observed with accumulation of litter, trash, and/or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
The (ceiling ) in the (front storage ) area is in poor repair.Observed missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bathroom #1. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom#2 was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

(Taquitos) was observed held at (51) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of product. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

(Pastries ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings on top of equipment and soda dispensing boxes ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

(Cases of water and single service pizza boxes) were observed stored on the floor in the ( outside storage room and office/storage area). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2025

(The lowboys ) located in the (front counter area ) area was not in good repair.Ambient temperatures observed at 50 and 73. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS products in units until repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (drink/coffee station cabinets ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2025
The outside refuse area observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

The following phsical facilities is in poor repair: 1.Holes in walls at coving under 3 bay sink. 2.Holes in walls in front counter area. 3.Holes in walls near toilet in bathroom. 4.Ceiling tiles in office.storage area is missing. 5.Cold water knob in bathroom #1 faucet. 6.floor under 3 bay sink is damaged(exposed concrete) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items and clutter were observed in the (substation room(retail area) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2025
